---
title: "about_2"
author: "Edward"
date: "2025-03-04"
output: html_document
---

The **_GAM-MAP_** uses **GAMs** to explore the relationship between malaria and climate variables. The modeling process involves several steps, illustrated in the diagram below:

<div style="text-align: center;">
  <img src="images/GAM_modelling_workflow.png" alt="GAM Modeling Workflow" width="800" height="700">
</div>


**Workflow summary:**
1. Set up the full GAM with all relevant predictors.  
2. Review diagnostics and adjust if needed.  
3. Evaluate smoothing terms to capture climate effects.  
4. Assess significance and adjust basis dimension (`k`) if required.  
5. Refit until stable, then finalise the full GAM.  
6. Build reduced models and compare with the full model.  
7. Select the best-fitting model and interpret results to support evidence-based insights for malaria control.  

***For detailed algorithmic steps and mathematical formulation, please refer to the manuscript or GAM framework under the Appendix tab.***
